court.needEligiblePlayers: Need at least 4 eligible players. Currently have {{available}}. (Total: {{total}}, Available: {{available}}, Unavailable: {{unavailable}}, In pending matches: {{pending}})
rosters.nameExists: A roster with this name already exists
app.title: Badminton Matchmaker
court.pickMatchDesc: Tap players to select. First 2 = Team A, next 2 = Team B.
court.startOverDesc: What would you like to reset?
court.sessionSummaryEmpty: No completed matches yet. Starting over now will just clear the current session state.
court.startOverWithPlayers: Clear matches and remove all players
court.confirmStartOver: Reset session? This will clear pending matches and reset all player stats.
court.saveRosterDesc: Give this roster a name so you can load the same players next time
court.overwriteDesc: You've loaded "{{name}}" and made changes. What would you like to do?
court.playerInPendingMatch: Cannot remove player who is in a pending match. Complete or delete the match first.
court.playerInCompletedMatches: Cannot remove player who has completed matches. This would affect match history and rankings.
court.cannotRemoveHasMatches: Cannot remove this player — they have pending or completed matches in this session. Use "Start Over" to reset the session first.
court.assignCourtDesc: Choose a court for this match, or move it back to the queue.
court.loadRosterConfirmDesc: Loading a new roster will clear all pending matches and reset player stats. Continue?
rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.lowSampleDescription: These players have fewer than {{count}} matches. Rankings may not be reliable.
rankings.lowSampleMessage: These players have fewer than {{threshold}} matches. Rankings may not be reliable.
rankings.viewHistoryHint: Tap a player's name to view their match history.
rankings.noHistory: No completed matches for this player yet.
history.noSnapshots: No snapshots yet. Save one to capture the current rankings.
rosters.infoBannerDesc: Player rosters are snapshots created on the Court screen. To add or remove players, edit your roster from the Court page.
settings.title: Settings
settings.requirePasscodeDesc: Protect completed match results from unauthorized changes
settings.requireAuthDescription: Protect completed match results from unauthorized changes
settings.passcodeNotSetDesc: Set a passcode to enable protection.
settings.passcodeSetDesc: A passcode has been set to protect edits.
settings.passcodeError: Passcode must be at least 4 characters
settings.lowSampleError: Low sample threshold must be at least 1
settings.dueUpError: Due-up threshold must be at least 1
settings.passcodeWarning: This is a simple MVP passcode, not cryptographically secure.
settings.passcodeWarningText: ⚠️ Warning: This is a simple MVP passcode, not cryptographically secure.
settings.lowSampleThresholdDesc: Players with fewer matches than this threshold are marked as "low sample size" in rankings
settings.lowSampleDescription: Players with fewer matches than this threshold are marked as "low sample size" in rankings
settings.dueUpThresholdDesc: Players are marked "due-up" if they've played this many matches fewer than average
settings.dueUpDescription: Players are marked "due-up" if they've played this many matches fewer than average
settings.allowPendingMatchesDesc: When enabled, players can be selected for new matches even if they're already in a pending match. Useful for advance planning.
settings.balanceTeamsByRankScoreDesc: Spread higher-rankScore players across both teams when a match is generated, instead of grouping the strongest players together.
settings.confirmDeleteMatch: Confirm before deleting a pending match
settings.confirmDeleteMatchDesc: When enabled, a confirmation dialog will appear before removing a generated match.
settings.courtViewEnabledDesc: Show visual court assignments. Matches are assigned to courts and displayed as court cards instead of a flat list.
settings.courtTimerEnabledDesc: Display a live stopwatch for each occupied court so players can track how long the current match has been running.
settings.numberOfCourtsDesc: How many physical courts are available.
settings.numberOfCourtsError: Number of courts must be between 1 and 6.
settings.courtNamesHint: To rename courts, go to the Courts tab and create or load a layout.
settings.strictCourtAutoFillDesc: When enabled, each queued match is locked to a specific court. It will only move onto that court when it becomes free — other empty courts are left alone.
settings.showScoreShortcutsDesc: Display quick-select score buttons when entering match results. Disable to save screen space.
settings.scoreShortcutRangeDesc: Range of scores shown as shortcut buttons (0–30).
settings.scoreShortcutRangeHint: Default range is 15–25. Min must be less than Max.
settings.scoreShortcutRangeError: Range must be between 0 and 30, and min must be less than max.
settings.appFontSizeDesc: Scale the text size across the entire app.
settings.wipeDataDesc: Permanently delete all players, matches, rosters and court layouts. This cannot be undone.
settings.wipeDataConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete all players, matches, rosters and court layouts. This action cannot be undone.
settings.wipeDataPasscodeDesc: Enter the admin passcode to confirm. This will permanently delete all data.
settings.resetSettingsDesc: Restore all settings to their defaults. Your players, matches, and rosters will not be affected.
settings.resetSettingsConfirmDesc: This will restore all settings to their defaults. Your data (players, matches, rosters) is safe.
settings.recentPlayersSuggestCountDesc: How many recently-seen players to show as quick-pick suggestions when adding a player. Players are sourced from saved session snapshots.
settings.showdownScoringDesc: Configure how Showdown mode affects ranking scores. These values apply to the initiating team only.
settings.showdownScoringError: Win bonus must be at least 1; loss deduction must be 0 or more.
settings.showdownScoringHint: Win: rankScore + Win Bonus. Loss: rankScore − Loss Deduction. Normal wins always +1.
settings.dataDesc: All data is stored locally on your device and never sent anywhere.
settings.dataLocalMessage: All data is stored locally on your device and never sent anywhere.
courts.title: Court Layouts
courts.subtitle: Save physical court arrangements to quickly configure the app for different venues.
court.pairModalDesc: This player will be paired on the same team when possible.
court.pairOneDirectional: ⚠️ Pairing is one-directional. For mutual pairing, the other player must also select you.
court.playerColorDesc: Choose a highlight color for this player's card. Changes will carry to saved rosters.
court.doNotPairDesc: Tap a player to block/unblock pairing them on the same team.
settings.appThemeDesc: Choose a color theme for the app.
settings.doNotPairEnabledDesc: When enabled, each player can block being teamed with specific others. The restriction button (⛔) will appear on each player's card.
settings.showPlayerScoresDesc: Display each player's current ranking score (pts) next to their name in the player list.
